text:
The [respondent] / [applicant] shall discharge as and when each payment becomes due, be solely responsible for and in any event indemnify the [applicant] / [respondent] against:

[all interest and capital repayments due in respect of the mortgage] / [all payments due in respect of the rent];

all [reasonable] sums due in respect of service charge, council tax, utilities (including but not limited to gas, electricity, water and telephone accounts), and buildings and contents insurance premiums in respect of [the family home] / [the interim new home]; and

[etc];

until [date] / [the date of provision of the new home for the [applicant] / [respondent] and the child[ren] of the family in accordance with paragraph [para number] below] [and] / [or] [the date of payment of the lump sum to the [applicant] / [respondent] for the benefit of the child[ren] of the family in accordance with paragraph [para number] below].

Provision of New Home – Transfer of Property

The [respondent] / [applicant] shall transfer to the [applicant] / [respondent] for the benefit of the child[ren] of the family all [his] / [her] legal estate and beneficial interest in the [family home] / [property name as in definition above], [subject to the mortgage[s] [mortgage name as in definition above] secured against the property], [on [date]] / [within [number] days of [the date of this order]. The costs of the transfer shall be borne by the [applicant] / [respondent] / [parties equally].

Provision of Family Home on Trust

The [respondent] / [applicant] shall settle on the [applicant] / [respondent] and a trustee [he] / [she] / [the parties or in default of agreement the court] shall appoint under the Trustee Act as trustees for the benefit of the child[ren] [the family home] / [the property [property name]] [by [time] on [date]] / [by [time] on the date [number] days after the date of this order]. The [family home] / [property] shall be held by the [applicant] / [respondent] and the trustee appointed on trust for the [respondent] / [applicant] upon the following terms:
